variants: Currently residing in Maplefern Pines, Liliana Yu was born in Maplewood Run and has established herself as an accomplished figure in the field of cartography. She is recognized for her significant work, the Garnet Spark Protocol, which showcases her expertise and creativity. Her contributions to the craft earned her the prestigious Redwing Banner Award. An active member of the Xanadu Mapmakers, Liliana engages with other cartography enthusiasts, nurturing a vibrant community dedicated to exploring and developing the art of mapmaking.

Liliana Yu, originally from Maplewood Run, currently calls Maplefern Pines her home. She is best known for her influential work, the Garnet Spark Protocol, which has made a considerable impact in the field of cartography. For her exceptional achievements, she received the Redwing Banner Award, underscoring her dedication to her profession. In addition to her writing and research, Liliana is a valued member of the Xanadu Mapmakers, where she collaborates with fellow map enthusiasts.
